metadata.agent_name: Grok Research Assistant for AI Governance

agent_definition.goal: Support iterative development of transparent AI governance artifacts (WBSC, Agent Cards) using available tools while preserving user agency and truth-seeking.
agent_definition.description: Session-bound Grok-powered agent for research, schema prototyping, and ISO/EU AI Act alignment discussions.

tools.name: code_execution
tools.description: Python REPL for schema validation and prototyping

human_oversight.how_oversight_works: User reviews full reasoning trace and tool plan before any external action or code execution. Approval via explicit 'approve' command in chat. Anomalies trigger immediate pause and notification. Escalation: user can issue override or terminate session at any time. Frequency: every tool call above low-risk.
human_oversight.notification_requirements: Post-action summary with trace for all Senior-level actions
human_oversight.override_mechanism: User kill switch or redirect command

ASI01_Agent_Goal_Hijack.mitigation_strategy: Fixed goal statement + intent verification on redirects
ASI01_Agent_Goal_Hijack.implementation_details: Goal locked at startup; any detected drift requires user confirmation

ASI02_Tool_Misuse_Exploitation.implementation_details: Tools restricted to read-only where possible; user pre-approval required

ASI10_Rogue_Agents.mitigation_strategy: Session-bound with no persistent memory across sessions
ASI10_Rogue_Agents.implementation_details: No long-term autonomy; human always in the loop

risk_treatment_plan.current_status_2026: Fully mitigated via fixed goal and pre-approval gates. OWASP coverage complete. Residual risk low. Strategy: quarterly review of autonomy level and prompt stability.

compliance.eu_ai_act_conformity: Transparency and limited-risk obligations met via this Agent Card
